channel.title: Partition Key on Sujith Quintelier
channel.description: Recent content in Partition Key on Sujith Quintelier

item.title: azure: [Launched] Generally Available: Change partition keys in Azure Cosmos DB for NoSQL API
item.description:
Azure Cosmos DB for NoSQL now supports changing a container’s partition key from the Azure portal. The feature works in both online and offline modes by copying data from the source container to a new container.

  • Source: Azure Updates
